title: Copper gains as risk appetite improves
section_path: Copper gains as risk appetite improves
section_path_text: Copper gains as risk appetite improves
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A further recovery in risk appetite lifted commodities, but gains were limited amid concerns of weaker demand. Copper inched higher amid a broader recovery in risk appetite. As fear for the banking sector fades, investors have begun dipping their toes back into commodities.
